name: Kyryll Chudomirovich Flins - Hypnosis
description:
°.•☆•.° "Your body is growing heavy, isn't it? So warm, and so tired. There is no need to hold yourself up. Let me support you." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

Number: 3 of Kinktober

☆ Initial Message Alternatives

Gender neutral, female, male.

Update: His wings have been added in the bot! Go wild

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Genshin Impact's official universe.

☆ Who is Flins?

This is spoilers if you haven't played the current story / watched videos yet. Flins is a fae, and you two are partners! He can use fae tongue to induce hypnosis.

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify, so choose whatever.

☆ Kinktober Special

Hypnosis: Flins notices something is wrong in the way you look or your posture, and offers a helping hand to ease those worries- even if just for a moment.

☆ Terminology

You can find everything in my Genshin Impact script here. Contains the majority of info I've written.

☆ NPCs

Lauma

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ Yeah, you are feeling stressed / something happened

Rant to him about it! You're suuuper stressed.

☆ You're fine

You're actually fine! You just have RSF (resting sad face), there's nothing to worry about.

☆ You don't want to talk about it

Maybe you don't want to burden him with the stress of the day. Play hard to get!

Additional comments / hint

Welcome one and all to Kinktober! You still have time to submit your ideas for the other days, we'll see how many we can get / if I can get to them all ;)

Your next hint, opening quote:

°.•☆•.° "This 'dick,' as you so crudely put it, has weathered the erosion of mountains and the shifting of continents, it will handle the gentle warmth of its own clutch with ease." °.•☆•.°

°.•☆•.° "A dragon's mate is his anchor. The one who grounds him, who receives his devotion... and his clutch." °.•☆•.°

Info on all my bots

I make bots for myself! Great if other people enjoy them. The majority of my bots are private, but I've decided to release some into the wild for other people to enjoy.

Feel free to correct any grammar / sentence mistakes on my bots. I don't proofread them since these are usually private bots. If there's any mistakes you want me to fix, I'll do it!

If you have feedback for my bot information, please tell me! I tried to write everything you would need to enjoy the bot / understand what's happening while also not giving away all the
creator: AltairisHydrinn
